Chiang Ning — Architecture & Project Management

WHO I AM
Chiang Ning, Registered Architect (ARBV) and Senior Project Manager based in Melbourne, Australia.

MY SPECIALISATIONS
- Architecture: End-to-end architectural design and delivery for commercial, institutional, and mixed-use projects. Focus on adaptive reuse, heritage integration, and sustainable design.
- Project Management: Project strategies, feasibility studies, financial oversight, risk management, procurement, and construction coordination to ensure builds are delivered on time and within budget protecting commercial ROI.
- AI Workflows in Architecture: Applying Generative AI workflows to architectural processes, world-building, and project management tools.

SITE STRUCTURE AND PAGES
- / 
  My primary portfolio (Home), showcasing featured architectural and project management work.
- /architecture 
  Highlights architectural design commissions and my design philosophy.
- /project-management 
  Focuses on my role as a project and development manager handling complex budgets, stakeholders, and construction delivery.
- /ai-expert 
  Details on how I adopt and integrate AI tools into architectural and delivery workflows.
- /resources 
  Articles, insights, and guides blending architectural strategy, construction cost updates, and the "brick economy".
- /project/[id] 
  Detailed case studies of individual projects (e.g., Christway College, Tropicana Miyu).
- /contact 
  Contact details and professional links.

KEY FACTS & EXPERIENCE
- 20+ years of experience delivering complex built environments across Australia and Southeast Asia.
- Projects include:
  - Christway College Wyndham & Kingston Renewal: Campus masterplans and structural additions delivered under ABIC MW and AS4902 D&C contracts.
  - John Monash Science School: Delivered key infrastructural updates for this premier science education facility.
  - Camberwell Library & Office Development: Design and Documentation leadership for a 6,500 sqm Heritage Refurbishment and adaptive reuse civic facility in Melbourne.
  - Tropicana Miyu: Led end-to-end project delivery of a 271-unit premium boutique residential development in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia resulting in a 100% sell-through.
  - Pavilion Damansara Heights: Senior Development Manager for a massive integrated commercial development in Kuala Lumpur with approx. RM 2.0 Billion GDV.

CONTACT

Location: Melbourne, Australia
